verifier_scope_note: Judged current repository state and fresh command results. Did not edit production code, commit, push, or touch docs/Axxon_One_Integration_APIs.postman_collection.json.
overall_rationale: AC1-AC14 are proven by current code inspection and fresh rerun artifacts. AC15 implementation and check requirements are proven; commit/push are parent-pending as allowed by the verifier request.

commands.name: tool_group_count_proof
commands.command: Instantiate all-enabled fake server and count registered tools/groups
commands.observed: 317 total tools, 312 server-local tools, 5 translator tools, 51 groups, 8 detector_playbooks tools

commands.name: material_scan
commands.command: Scan changed task files for added proto/key/cert/ticket/credential/raw media/raw metadata/biometric/license material
commands.observed: No high-risk added file paths; content hits are sanitizer keywords, safety prose, or synthetic SHOULD_NOT_LEAK fixtures

commands.name: git_status_diff_name_status
commands.command: git status --short; git diff --name-status; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
commands.observed: Task changes plus pre-existing untracked docs/Axxon_One_Integration_APIs.postman_collection.json; Postman collection remains uncommitted

acceptance_criteria.notes: detector_playbooks is in CAPABILITY_GROUPS, parser/default-open/read-only approval handling is covered, create_server registers only when provided, list_capabilities reports disabled/enabled correctly, and main does not expose operator tools as a public side effect.
Exactly eight detector_playbooks tools are registered when enabled and none when disabled.

acceptance_criteria.text: Connection, catalog, and schema helper behavior
acceptance_criteria.notes: env connection returns sanitized detector-playbooks summary and gates; non-env profiles return gap without connecting; schema delegates to detector_archive and preserves descriptor/value-kind/visual element data while redacting secrets.
Matrix separates supported fallback/local kinds, live/template/factory discovered kinds with provenance, and fixture-needed GlobalTracker, RealtimeRecognizerExternal, and TagAndTrack families.

acceptance_criteria.text: Task-first planning for core detector mutations
acceptance_criteria.notes: Supported intents map to existing operator workflows; planning calls operator.plan and does not apply/rollback; public responses use detector-playbook plan IDs and Phase 4 tokens.

acceptance_criteria.text: Typed geometry for masks, areas, and lines
acceptance_criteria.notes: Geometry plans require descriptor-resolved VisualElement/property/value_kind and build exact value_rectangle/value_polyline/value_mask/value_simple_polygon payloads; mismatches reject before operator planning.

Occasional and periodical events delegate to operator workflows, operator validates access_point, periodical tracklets are capped/sanitized, and event rollback is classified as noop via operator rollback metadata.
Guidance intents are non-apply-ready, include SceneDescription chain guidance and safe next-tool metadata/VMDA/heatmap guidance, and do not fetch raw samples.
GlobalTracker profile, RealtimeRecognizerExternal, and TagAndTrack plans are fixture-needed/non-apply-ready and apply rejects them without operator calls.

acceptance_criteria.text: Approval gates, delegation, verify, and rollback
acceptance_criteria.notes: Apply/rollback reject unknown, non-apply-ready, missing env, and bad token cases; valid calls delegate with stored operator tokens; reapply/rerollback and never-applied rollback are deterministic.
Recursive sanitizer covers sensitive keys/values and operator internals; audit entries include sequence/timestamp/action/plan/intent/status/reason without raw params or operator tokens.
Builder RED artifact shows missing module/server behavior before implementation; fresh verifier reruns pass focused, adjacent, and full suites.
README and roadmap state 317 tools, 312 server-local, 5 translator, and 51 groups; docs/COVERAGE.md is unchanged; the two detector mutation playbook docs are present.
Evidence artifacts exist and evidence.json is valid JSON. Builder recorded no commit/push output because commit/push were explicitly deferred; this fresh verifier adds the required verdict artifact.

acceptance_criteria.text: Final verification, fresh verifier, commit, and push
acceptance_criteria.notes: Fresh verifier verdict is PASS. Full unittest discovery and git diff --check pass. Final status has task changes plus the pre-existing untracked Postman collection. Commit and push are parent-pending per verifier instructions.

material_scan_result.notes: Content scan hits are sanitizer keywords, safety prose, or synthetic SHOULD_NOT_LEAK test fixtures.

Untracked task files are the two mutation playbook docs, tools/axxon_mcp_detector_playbooks.py, and tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_detector_playbooks.py.
